title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 521.210 - Such writs, how entitled
text:
521.210.  Such writs, how entitled. — Every writ of attachment sued out by virtue of either section 521.130 or 521.200 shall be entitled in the cause pending, and be in aid thereof.
(RSMo 1939 § 1452) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1288; 1919 § 1739; 1909 § 2308
